history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, moody, low-key portrait of a shirtless man taking a selfie with his phone. The man is leaning against a wall with vertical curtains or blinds in the background, which are slightly out of focus and create a soft, diffused light. He has dark, styled hair and is holding a smartphone with a patterned case up to his face, obscuring his features. His body is muscular, with visible abs and chest muscles, illuminated by the dramatic lighting that casts strong shadows. One arm rests on his leg, and a simple bracelet is visible on his wrist. The overall atmosphere is intimate and artistic, with a focus on form and shadow, reminiscent of chiaroscuro. The color palette is strictly monochrome, emphasizing the textures and contours of the subject and the environment.
